## Summary
One-line description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation
Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposal
- Describe the desired behavior or syntax.
- Example code in J (if applicable):

```j
# Example of how it could look or be used
```

## Alternatives
Any alternative designs or syntax you considered.

## Additional context
Links, references, or related issues.
